nasb.text: And He called them to Himself and began speaking to them in parables, “How can Satan cast out Satan?

esv.text: And he called them to him and said to them in parables, “How can Satan cast out Satan?

cnv.text: 耶穌把他們叫來，用比喻對他們說：“撒但怎能趕逐撒但呢？

ccb.text: 耶稣叫他们来，用比喻对他们说：“撒旦怎能驱逐撒旦呢？

csbs.text: 耶稣把他们召来，用比喻对他们说：“撒旦怎么能够驱赶撒旦呢？
